title: 弥生賞の後に・時は金なり

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
choice_data_list: Tachyon, you did great out there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! I did fine, I think.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Either way, next up is the Satsuki Sho. We should
tailor my preparations appropriately.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Training... Ah, but of course, you would...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it, just talking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anyhow, time is money! Back to the lab! Back to
the lab!
